cron-expression-parser.title: Cron expression parser
cron-expression-parser.description: Validate and parse cron expressions into human-readable output.
cron-expression-parser.cardInputDescription: Validate a cron expression, read its human description, and inspect each field.
cron-expression-parser.invalidExpression: Provided cron expression is not valid.
cron-expression-parser.builderCardDescription: Fill in each cron field and generate an expression instantly.
cron-expression-parser.includeYearDescription: Append the optional year field as the seventh cron segment.
cron-expression-parser.invalidBuiltExpression: Built cron expression is not valid.
cron-expression-parser.builtPreviewDescription: Preview the generated expression before loading it into the parser.
